sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29179" key="duskrath/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δυσ-κρᾰτής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> sq., <sense id="n29179.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">δυσκρατέστατον πάντων ὁ λόγος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.33.10</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
